title: Why Troy University for Locals & International Students
body: Calling Troy Alabama’s international university feels so accurate  I visited once and the mix of cultures on campus was unreal.
author: @LydiaRose-u8g

title: Why International Students Choose Troy University | Sohail Explains the Trojan Advantage
body: As someone who’s been through the U.S. university system, what he’s saying is spot on. A campus that’s affordable, supportive, and not overcrowded is rare. The international scholarship alone would’ve changed my entire journey. Students really don’t realize what a good deal this is.
author: @CeciMcKinsey

title: Why International Students Choose Troy University | Sohail Explains the Trojan Advantage
body: This brought back so many memories. Johala has been a fixture at Troy forever, and he's right, it's that 'big college experience in a friendly small town' that makes it unique. So proud to be a Trojan
author: @chathman

title: Why International Students Choose Troy University | Sohail Explains the Trojan Advantage
body: 38 years and never transferred out. That says more about the community and the people than any statistic ever could.
author: @Anslin-j9m

title: A Day in My Life | Troy University
body:
Hi, Alice!
I'm Matthew and I'd like to try Troy next year. I'm from Brazil and I've got some questions about this college. I'd like to get a conversation about it, if possible, of course.
Congrats of the channel, it's an excellent way to get contact with the USA culture.
author: @matthewdelmiro87

title: Celebration of Life and Legacy of Rep. John Lewis
body: You would never have imagined when John Lewis started his journey with the civil rights marches and beatings and overall sacrificing his life that he would be honored at this capacity by the same white people in the same state where he was brutally beaten and ridiculed. He was honored by others as well.
author: @jcextranow
